'''âv-n-zh''' ('''kavanazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quile|quile]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quile|quile]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-n-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kavanazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivanazh|thivanazh]] || [[word:jivanazh|jivanazh]] || [[word:shivanazh|shivanazh]] || [[word:kivanazh|kivanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvanazh|thuthuvanazh]] || [[word:jujuvanazh|jujuvanazh]] || [[word:shushuvanazh|shushuvanazh]] || [[word:kukuvanazh|kukuvanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvanazh|thuvanazh]] || [[word:juvanazh|juvanazh]] || [[word:shuvanazh|shuvanazh]] || [[word:kuvanazh|kuvanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvanazh|thuvanazh]] || [[word:juvanazh|juvanazh]] || [[word:shuvanazh|shuvanazh]] || [[word:kuvanazh|kuvanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevanazh|thevanazh]] || [[word:jevanazh|jevanazh]] || [[word:shevanazh|shevanazh]] || [[word:kevanazh|kevanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovanazh|thothovanazh]] || [[word:jojovanazh|jojovanazh]] || [[word:shoshovanazh|shoshovanazh]] || [[word:kokovanazh|kokovanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovanazh|thovanazh]] || [[word:jovanazh|jovanazh]] || [[word:shovanazh|shovanazh]] || [[word:kovanazh|kovanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovanazh|thovanazh]] || [[word:jovanazh|jovanazh]] || [[word:shovanazh|shovanazh]] || [[word:kovanazh|kovanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvanazh|thĂŠvanazh]] || [[word:jĂŠvanazh|jĂŠvanazh]] || [[word:shĂŠvanazh|shĂŠvanazh]] || [[word:kĂŠvanazh|kĂŠvanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavanazh|thathavanazh]] || [[word:jajavanazh|jajavanazh]] || [[word:shashavanazh|shashavanazh]] || [[word:kakavanazh|kakavanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavanazh|thavanazh]] || [[word:javanazh|javanazh]] || [[word:shavanazh|shavanazh]] || [[word:kavanazh|kavanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavanazh|thavanazh]] || [[word:javanazh|javanazh]] || [[word:shavanazh|shavanazh]] || [[word:kavanazh|kavanazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavanazh|shavanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavanazh|goshavanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavanazh|gokishavanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavanazhnĂŒ|shavanazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavanazhnknĂŒ|goshavanazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavanazhnĂŒ|gokishavanazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavanazhshĂ«|shavanazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkshĂ«|goshavanazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavanazhshĂ«|gokishavanazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavanazhro|shavanazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkro|goshavanazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavanazhro|gokishavanazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavanazhmu|shavanazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkmu|goshavanazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavanazhmu|gokishavanazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavanazhsher|shavanazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavanazhnksher|goshavanazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavanazhsher|gokishavanazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavanazhng|shavanazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkng|goshavanazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavanazhng|gokishavanazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavanazhya|shavanazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkya|goshavanazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavanazhya|gokishavanazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavanazhyam|shavanazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkyam|goshavanazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavanazhyam|gokishavanazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavanazhnĂŒshĂ«|shavanazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavanazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavanazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavanazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavanazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavanazhnĂŒro|shavanazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavanazhnknĂŒro|goshavanazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavanazhnĂŒro|gokishavanazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavanazhnĂŒmu|shavanazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavanazhnknĂŒmu|goshavanazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavanazhnĂŒmu|gokishavanazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavanazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shavanazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavanazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavanazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavanazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavanazhshĂ«ro|shavanazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkshĂ«ro|goshavanazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavanazhshĂ«ro|gokishavanazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavanazhshĂ«mu|shavanazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkshĂ«mu|goshavanazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavanazhshĂ«mu|gokishavanazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavanazhronĂŒ|shavanazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkronĂŒ|goshavanazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavanazhronĂŒ|gokishavanazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavanazhroshĂ«|shavanazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkroshĂ«|goshavanazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavanazhroshĂ«|gokishavanazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavanazhromu|shavanazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkromu|goshavanazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavanazhromu|gokishavanazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavanazhmunĂŒ|shavanazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkmunĂŒ|goshavanazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavanazhmunĂŒ|gokishavanazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavanazhmushĂ«|shavanazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkmushĂ«|goshavanazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavanazhmushĂ«|gokishavanazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavanazhmuro|shavanazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavanazhnkmuro|goshavanazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavanazhmuro|gokishavanazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
